The '''''Nuna's Twins''''' was a captured [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to infiltrate the Imperial base on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]].

{{Ship-stub}}
